programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las yemas de los dedos y los dientes desmembrados de un marine asesinado se descubren en el bolso robado a un carterista, lo que lanza al NCIS a la misión de encontrar a un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo del NCIS se entera del espeluznante asesinato de uno de sus antiguos ayudantes de investigación, pronto descubren que la víctima ha estado vendiendo información sobre cómo robar un almacén lleno de posesiones caras.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs cuestiona los motivos de Vance cuando le piden que interrogue a un adolescente acusado de matar a su padre, un marine retirado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A sangre fría
programme.desc: Cuando un teniente de la policía de Nueva York, recientemente retirado y bien considerado, es acusado de disparar a un grupo de posibles asaltantes en el metro y posteriormente desaparece, Frank debe enfrentar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El camino al infierno
programme.desc: Danny debe determinar quién asesinó a un hombre cuando varias mujeres que trabajaron para él se atribuyen el mérito.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Erin se siente abrumada por la culpa después de que un hombre al que liberó es acusado de matar a un policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Wichita en busca de un sospechoso que secuestra niños mientras sus padres duermen. Además, Morgan está intentando averiguar quién fue el responsable del ataque.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un sujeto ataca a la UAC, el equipo entra en acción para averiguar quién es el responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects flee an overturned auto, a man is accused of battery with a chain leash, and an unlucky gambler is dealt another losing hand by police when he decides to drive drunk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disoriented suspect would rather take a shower than comply with officers, a stolen vehicle sting nets a surprisingly young driver, and a traffic stop leads to a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police try to settle a dispute between roommates, a jilted man causes a disturbance at a public park twice in one day, and an erratic driver proves to be surprisingly sober.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Tinted car windows draw suspicion from a roaming patrol, a concerned friend gets a punch in the nose, and a traffic stop leads police a meth pipe in an odd place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team arrives at a car crash, they find three casualties and a human brain that doesn't belong to any of the victims.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates three seemingly unrelated murders, they discover someone is getting revenge for cold case murders that were never solved.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers a deceased rancher was also a ballistics expert, they have to work with the FBI to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the body of a naked dead man is discovered by Dr. Robbins' wife in their master bedroom, it leads to a lot of questions for the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Willows works with the FBI again after a professional hit occurs at a law firm she's recommended to her friend.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team says goodbye to Catherine Willows as she makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead and her hair is done up '70s style complete with vintage clothes, the CSI team discovers clues that point to a killer with a hair fetish.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell asks for advice from a former colleague on a case involving the death of a man's ex-girlfriend. Elisabeth Shue Joins The Cast As New CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a house is stolen completely off its foundation, the CSIs are on the case in search of answers. Meanwhile, new CSI Julie Finlay showcases her skill in blood analysis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a blackout cripples the city, the CSIs must revert to old-school methods to solve the case of a missing child.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are brought in to solve the case of a recently murdered student whose death photo ends up trending on the Internet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team is called in to investigate a robbery-homicide at an "Alice In Wonderland"-themed wedding, they have little to work with to find a killer. (Jaclyn Smith guest stars)

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team is called in to investigate a man who is shot at point-blank range in a local casino, they shut down the entire building to find their killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Stokes learns that a man he helped put in prison is going to have his conviction overturned, the CSI team needs to prove the killer is guilty again or he will be released.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Morgan, Sidle y Finlay intentan de relajarse en una conferencia forense cuando ocurre un tiroteo masivo en el sitio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La frustración se acumula para el equipo de CSI cuando aparece otra víctima y toda la evidencia apunta al asesino de Gig Harbor. Las estrellas invitadas son Mark-Paul Goselaar, Mark Valley y Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una mujer alcoholizada y drogada en la piscina de un centro de rehabilitación.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI profundiza en el morboso mundo de las “muñecas de caucho” cuando investigan el asesinato de un hombre apuñalado en un callejón.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en la cárcel del condado de Clark después de que un interno tropieza con un cuerpo mientras huye de los oficiales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la extraña muerte de un hombre que ha sido asesinado no una, sino dos veces. Sharon Osbourne es la estrella invitada en el papel de Elise Massey, la directora del campeonato de billar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La investigación del CSI sobre la víctima de un aparente accidente y fuga, los lleva al mundo aeronáutico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI reabre un caso de asesinato/suicidio de 10 años de antigüedad, cuando la única sobreviviente afirma que su padre acusado era inocente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI descubre que el principal sospechoso de los asesinatos en Gig Harbor, está siendo puesto en libertad por falta de pruebas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una convención para gente que recoge recuerdos de asesinatos macabros.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Julia Stiles y la ganadora del Oscar Shirley MacLaine protagonizan esta encantadora comedia romántica en la que una joven intenta escapar de su excéntrica familia sureña, y conocer al hombre de sus sueños.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: La niñera y el presidente
programme.desc: Una cosmetóloga de Nueva York, tomada por error como maestra de ciencia, recibe una propuesta de trabajo para darles clase a los hijos de un dictador de Europa Oriental.

programme.title: El enamorado
programme.desc: Martin Corona encuentra el amor y promote a su esposa a no volver a usar armas, hasta que sus enemigos lo obligan a volver a luchar, ahora por defender a su propia familia.

programme.title: Cuidado con el amor
programme.desc: Pedro, con la ayuda de dos mejores amigos de su padre busca un tesoro enterrado en una hacienda colonial. Elsa y su madre quieren impedirlo. Al fin el amor interviene y Pedro y Elsa comparten la fortuna y su felicidad.

programme.title: Esos de Penjamo
programme.desc: Un ranchero se casa con su prima para que sus herederos puedan quedarse con sus propiedades cuando muera. Al no poder quedar en embarazo, su ambiciosa cuñada toma provecho de la situación.

programme.title: Por ellas, aunque mal paguen
programme.desc: Un aristócrata arruinado casa a su hija con un rico ranchero para no caer en la pobreza, sin saber que este es más astuto que ellos y los pone a trabajar duro en el campo.

programme.title: El enamorado
programme.desc: Martin Corona encuentra el amor y promote a su esposa a no volver a usar armas, hasta que sus enemigos lo obligan a volver a luchar, ahora por defender a su propia familia.

programme.title: Cuidado con el amor
programme.desc: Pedro, con la ayuda de dos mejores amigos de su padre busca un tesoro enterrado en una hacienda colonial. Elsa y su madre quieren impedirlo. Al fin el amor interviene y Pedro y Elsa comparten la fortuna y su felicidad.

programme.title: Esos de Penjamo
programme.desc: Un ranchero se casa con su prima para que sus herederos puedan quedarse con sus propiedades cuando muera. Al no poder quedar en embarazo, su ambiciosa cuñada toma provecho de la situación.

programme.title: El escritor fantasma
programme.desc: El cineasta Roman Polanski eleva la tensión en este thriller sobre un escritor (Ewan McGregor) encargado de redactar las vivencias de un ex primer ministro (Pierce Brosnan).

programme.title: Un plan sencillo
programme.desc: Dos hermanos encuentran cuatro millones de dólares en una avioneta caída e intentan quedarse con el dinero, pero la paranoia, la codicia y el miedo a ser capturado hacen que su plan esté fuera de control, con consecuencias desastrosas.

programme.title: Justo a tiempo
programme.desc: Gene llega a su casa después de asistir al funeral de su exesposa. Al poco tiempo, secuestran a su hija. Recibe una pistola y la tarea de matar a una persona en una hora y quince minutos. De lo contrario, su hija será asesinada.

programme.title: El apartamento
programme.desc: ¿Y si la mujer que amabas desapareciera sin una sola palabra? ¿Hasta qué punto volverías a encontrarla? Josh Hartnett, Diane Kruger, Rose Byrne y Matthew Lillard protagonizan este intenso neonoir donde el amor se convierte en obsesivo.

programme.title: El silencio de los inocentes
programme.desc: Un psicópata llamado Buffalo Bill está asesinando mujeres, por lo que el FBI envía a la agente Clarice Starling a entrevistar a un prisionero demente: el Dr. Hannibal Lecter, un psiquiatra caníbal que tiene una fascinación por asesinar.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins regresa como el Dr. Hannibal Lecter, uno de los asesinos en serie más astutos y temidos del mundo, que reaparece después de una década para jugar con la agente del FBI Clarice Starling (Julianne Moore).

programme.title: El álamo
programme.desc: John Wayne y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta espectacular película histórica sobre el ataque de las tropas mexicanas en el in Álamo.

programme.title: En el tiempo de las mariposas
programme.desc: En el tiempo de las mariposas es una novela de la escritora dominicana Julia Álvarez, publicada en 1994, sobre la historia de las hermanas Mirabal.

programme.title: Babel (ESP)
programme.desc: Del aclamado director Alejandro González Iñárritu (Amores Perros, 21 Gramos) llega el tercer filme de su trilogía, Babel, una película aplaudida por la crítica y de una gran emotividad sobre las barreras que separan a la humanidad.

programme.title: Valkiria
programme.desc: Una dramatización del asesinato y complot político del 20 de julio de 1944 por oficiales del ejército alemán renegados desesperados contra Adolf Hitler durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Mente indomable
programme.desc: El exitoso drama ganador del Óscar, que lanzó las carreras de Matt Damon y Ben Affleck, cuenta la historia de un genio de clase obrera obstinado a quien no le va bien en la vida, hasta que conoce a un profesor de psicología cercano (Robin Williams).

programme.title: En el tiempo de las mariposas
programme.desc: En el tiempo de las mariposas es una novela de la escritora dominicana Julia Álvarez, publicada en 1994, sobre la historia de las hermanas Mirabal.

programme.title: La hija del lobo
programme.desc: Una veterana militar debe rastrear a la banda que secuestró a su hijo en el desierto helado, solo para descubrir un secreto mortal y enfrentarse a un líder despiadado que pondrá a prueba hasta dónde llegará una madre para proteger a su hijo.

programme.title: Máxima venganza
programme.desc: En la línea de TRAINING DAY, STREET KINGS y AMERICAN GANGSTER, Curtis 50 CENT Jackson, Val Kilmer y Vinnie Jones protagonizan una nueva película de acción llena de venganza entre policías buenos y malos.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Survivor (2015)
programme.desc: Incriminada por crímenes que no cometió, una diplomática (Milla Jovovich, El quinto elemento) trata de impedir un ataque terrorista en Nueva York. Con Pierce Brosnan y Dylan McDermott.

programme.title: Terminator: El exterminador
programme.desc: En 2029, las super-computadoras dominan el planeta y buscan exterminar la raza humana. Para ello, mandan de regreso en el tiempo a un indestructible cyborg con la misión de matar a Sarah Connor, cuyo hijo se convertirá en la esperanza de la humanidad.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: Máxima venganza
programme.desc: En la línea de TRAINING DAY, STREET KINGS y AMERICAN GANGSTER, Curtis 50 CENT Jackson, Val Kilmer y Vinnie Jones protagonizan una nueva película de acción llena de venganza entre policías buenos y malos.

programme.title: El fantasma
programme.desc: La historia comienza cuando una expedición llega a la isla de Bengalla, en búsqueda de las calaveras de Touganda. Podrían usarse para invocar el poder de la energía, pero también podrían significar un desastre para la humanidad.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: Los Hermanos Grimm
programme.desc: En esta película visionaria, Will y Jake Grimm sorprenden a los pueblos con sus folclores creativos e ilusiones elaboradas, pero descubren que los personajes fantásticos y las situaciones emocionantes en sus amadas historias son reales.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: Un perro que ayudó a los soldados en Afganistán vuelve a los EUA, donde lo adopta la familia de su adiestrador tras sufrir una experiencia traumática.

programme.title: El Smoking
programme.desc: Jimmy Tong es un taxista común transformado en chofer, que se tropieza con un traje de superespía de 2 mil millones de dólares, e inadvertidamente se convierte en un elegante agente secreto.

programme.title: El monje
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat y Seann William Scott protagonizan esta gran aventura, en la que un misterioso monje tibetano, quien ha protejido un pergamino por 60 años; cree que ha encontrado a su sucesor: un joven callejero.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: ¡Todos quieren algo!
programme.desc: Es 1980, Jake y sus locos amigos, estudiantes de primer año, viven su odisea con fiestas y partidos justo antes de comenzar las clases. Del guionista y director Richard Linklater, llega la película que demuestra que los buenos tiempos nunca envejecen.

programme.title: Ella está encantada
programme.desc: Anne Hathaway, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza un inolvidable cuento de hadas moderno en el que una muchacha recibe el don de la obediencia de su hada madrina. Una asombrosa aventura mágica repleta de coloridos personajes, música, ingenio y fantasía.

programme.title: Estrenando cuerpo
programme.desc: El cómico en aprietos Lance Barton sabe cómo es morir en escena. Pero cuando su vida toma un giro inesperado, directo al cielo, Lance está seguro de que ha habido un error.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: El Cuerpo
programme.desc: Un detective busca el cuerpo de una mujer fatal después de que desaparece de la morgue.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: La Reina de la Navidad
programme.desc: Ashley siempre ha sido la "Reina de la Navidad" de la ciudad. Es decir, hasta que conoce a su pareja en la ciudad, Ben, un chico nuevo y atractivo que ama la Navidad tanto como ella. Unen fuerzas para hacer que la Navidad sea aún más significativa.

programme.title: Navidad en Washington
programme.desc: La decoradora Emily consigue el contrato para decorar la embajada de Kalmar para la Navidad. Pero el nuevo embajador Magnus no tiene tiempo para Navidad.

programme.title: Una navidad para saborear
programme.desc: Scarlett es una chef increíble pero cada año, sus platos navideños nunca se venden! Así que este año, su mejor amiga le compra un boleto para una escapada de cocina navideña en una hermosa villa... donde Scarlett volverá a aprender la cocina festiva.

programme.title: Cupido no funciona
programme.desc: Holly, profesora universitaria, se inscribe en un servicio de citas románticas en línea, pero sospecha que algo anda mal cuando ve que las acciones del chico no coinciden con sus bonitos mensajes.

programme.title: Cupido navideño
programme.desc: Dos asistentes ejecutivos que trabajan duro hacen arreglos para que sus jefes se enamoren durante las vacaciones.

programme.title: La Reina de la Navidad
programme.desc: Ashley siempre ha sido la "Reina de la Navidad" de la ciudad. Es decir, hasta que conoce a su pareja en la ciudad, Ben, un chico nuevo y atractivo que ama la Navidad tanto como ella. Unen fuerzas para hacer que la Navidad sea aún más significativa.

programme.title: Milagro de navidad
programme.desc: La joven Jessica encuentra un reno herido en el bosque nevado. Creyendo que es el verdadero Prancer, promete curarlo para devolvérselo a Papá Noel, y su empeño cambiará mágicamente la vida de toda la gente a su alrededor.

programme.title: Freeway
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: Leviatán, terror en la profundidad
programme.desc: En esta película de ciencia ficción, un equipo de exploración de aguas profundas descubre un barco de carga con un secreto mortal.

programme.title: Candyman: El terror
programme.desc: Secuela de "Candyman", ambientada en Nueva Orleans. Un maestro de escuela descubre el vínculo entre una serie de asesinatos misteriosos y el espíritu de un esclavo asesinado injustamente.

programme.title: Tú eres el próximo
programme.desc: La reunión familiar de los Davis se tuerce cuando su casa es asediada por un equipo de asaltantes con máscaras y ballestas.

programme.title: Juegos Diabólicos II
programme.desc: ¡Han vuelto! En esta aterradora secuela, la familia Freeling se muda a un nuevo hogar. Pero los espíritus de los muertos siguen obsesionados por llevarse a Carol Anne, la hija clarividente al más allá.

programme.title: Operación Overlord
programme.desc: Nada puede prepararte para el caos alucinante de Operación Overlord. El mega productor J.J. Abrams crea un emocionante viaje retorcido sobre un equipo de tropas estadounidenses que se encuentran cara a cara con los súper soldados nazis nunca vistos.

programme.title: Candyman: El terror
programme.desc: Secuela de "Candyman", ambientada en Nueva Orleans. Un maestro de escuela descubre el vínculo entre una serie de asesinatos misteriosos y el espíritu de un esclavo asesinado injustamente.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: Archie (Gregory Peck) and his partner, Billy (Desi Arnaz, Jr.) are bandits by trade, staging daring robberies throughout the American frontier. But when their latest heist takes a deadly turn, they are pursued by a ruthless marshal (Jack Warden).

programme.title: Man With The Gun
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: This Oscar®-nominated film has the legendary Cary Grant as a government attorney who can't seem to shake his bad fortune. Living on a houseboat, widowed and left with three unruly kids, he hires Sophia Loren as a governess.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He’s enchanted by her small town ways, she’s captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: The Bellboy
programme.desc: Lewis stars as Stanley, a non-speaking, bumbling bellhop at the ritzy Fontainebleau Hotel in Florida’s Miami Beach. Guests may come and guests may go, but Stanley is on duty day after day at the posh resort, encountering all sorts of catastrophes.

programme.title: Cinderfella
programme.desc: Jerry Lewis plays Cinderfella – a hard-working and honest lad mistreated by his wicked stepmother and his two boorish stepbrothers. But miracles do happen when his Fairy Godfather transforms the klutzy fella into an eligible, handsome bachelor.

programme.title: The Disorderly Orderly
programme.desc: Poor Jerome Littlefield. He wants to be a doctor, but he's incredibly squeamish. So he settles for the job of an orderly at the Whitestone Sanitarium, a career move that’s guaranteed to keep the patients in stitches!

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: The Pink Panther (1964)
programme.desc: In this riotously funny farce, Peter Sellers introduced the world to Jacques Clouseau, the clumsiest Inspector ever to trip over a case, who is out to stop the notorious Phantom (David Niven) from stealing the priceless Pink Panther diamond!

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: After turning down the role of Scrooge in a Felix directed Christmas play, Oscar kicks Felix out of the apartment.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: The boys want a raise in their allowance, but Steve tells them that they are spending money recklessly and not doing their chores.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: While working on a Social Studies project on teenage marriages for school, Mike (Tim Considine) and his girlfriend Jean (Cynthia Pepper) have everyone convinced that they've eloped.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie is tired of all the teachers at school calling him "Mike's brother" and making comparisons about how each of the boys are different.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When Bub has to go out of town for a few days, Steve asks Mike to call an agency and hire a maid. Mike asks Robbie to make the call, and Robbie asks Chip to make the call. Chip calls an agency but it is a marriage agency who matches people.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The 'Alan Brady' writers entertain at a prison and Rob gets locked up with the inmates.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob puts his job at risk when he convinces Alan Brady to host a cultural documentary program.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura takes two of Millie's prescription pills and suffers disastrous side effects.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob tries to get a raise for Buddy and Sally from Alan Brady's tight-fisted accountant.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo and Steve swear never to remove their wedding rings, but the next day she accidentally drops hers down the drain of the kitchen sink.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo and Steve argue about where their unborn baby should be born.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The pregnant Betty Jo is ready to have her baby but problems arise when Wendell, the conductor won't wake up and Betty Jo has to drive the train herself.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Granny goes to Hooterville to take care of Betty Jo's new baby, but loses her glasses and mistakes the family dog for the child.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Doc Stuart's new associate turns out to be an attractive woman, which seems to displease everyone in Hooterville.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Dr. Janet Craig, rebuffed as a physician by the local males, sets out to win them over as a woman--and a good cook.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N. Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train "Killer" a German Sheppard intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation, Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job. Of course, what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers, Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship, unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carter's mission.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers, has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant, Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver. When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth, the whole truth and nothing but the truth.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a few days before Oliver (Eddie Albert)'s birthday, and Lisa (Eva Gabor) doesn't know quite what to get him…until the old Hoyt Clagwell goes kerflooey! So, she goes out and buys the biggest and fanciest tractor she can find.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Eb (Tom Lester) has a way with sick animals after Eb cures Arnold, the pig, and Alice, the chicken, and offers to put him through veterinary college. But will life in Green Acres ever be the same without Ed?!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A horse follows Oliver (Eddie Albert) home, but every time he tries to show it to his wife, the horse disappears. Lisa (Eva Gabor) assumes that her husband is imagining things…and as more animals show up, Oliver begins to think so too.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) takes Oliver (Eddie Albert) to Pixley Superior Municipal Court and sues him for non-payment of a vital contract over the little matter of some rain…or lack thereof. Does Mr. Haney know who he's up against? Does Oliver?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Third-Tuesday-of-Every-Month-Culture-Committee of the Every-Other-Wednesday-Afternoon-Discussion-Club decides that Hooterville needs some culture in the form of a symphony orchestra. And Lisa (Eva Gabor) may just know the perfect conductor.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Diana Walker, the daughter of a newspaper tycoon and Mannix's old flame, comes back into Mannix's life after a four-year absence.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is called in the middle of the night by an acquaintance, Pete Neal, and offered $1,000 to protect a man named Frank Devereau just until the following morning.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Peter Martin, the son of a respected doctor who often ministered to the less fortunate, is found at the bottom of the stairs in his home with his neck broken.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix must find the kidnapped daughter of a Palm Springs mobster.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When the brother of a cop is killed along with the mobster he was working for, the young officer is assigned to work undercover as a bookie to find out who ordered the hit.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two judges and two attorneys have been murdered and a book about disbarment procedures for lawyers is found nearby.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A terminally ill circus rigger is killed in his hospital bed by someone made up as a clown.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A New York City detective comes to San Francisco in search of a cop killer.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un incendio sospechoso arrasó un apartamento y mató a dos mujeres jóvenes. La causa del incendio y la identidad de las víctimas no estaban claras.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de 13 años desapareció de su casa en Colorado y la única evidencia que dejó el secuestrador fueron tres huellas digitales en la cortina de una ventana.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, Eileen y Derrick Severs desaparecen de su casa en un pequeño pueblo de Gran Bretaña y la policía encuentra evidencia de un crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nicole Rae Walker, de 6 años de edad, murió en un choque donde el culpable se dio a la fuga en su Vecindario de Ft. Lauderdale.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, más de una docena de niños en Seattle, Washington, luchaban por sus vidas. Cada uno de ellos había contraído una enfermedad grave desconocida. Después de que uno murió, los investigadores sabían que el reloj estaba corriendo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un rastro de un asesinato se esfuma, hasta que la policía recibe un llamado de una mujer cuyo esposo, Gerald Powers, tenía un pasado criminal y una afición por los Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesinato de un turista estadounidense en un centro turístico mexicano centró los recursos policiales en ambos lados de la frontera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los testigos vieron a una mujer en la parte trasera de un camión, agitando los brazos y gritando. Cuando encontraron una chaqueta cerca de un charco de sangre, supieron que lo que habían visto no había sido un paseo divertido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El ex amante de un sospechoso se presenta con una fantástica historia de asesinato, mutilación y cremación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bomba, construida para poder causar tanto daño como sea posible, mata a la víctima con una fuerza y llama mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre, Tammy Tatum, fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una modelo aspirante apareció muerta y el sospechoso principal fue su novio. Cuando finalmente se le dio el visto bueno, los investigadores tuvieron que buscar más profundamente para poder encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Afición al veneno
programme.desc: Tres muertes aparentemente no relacionadas resultaron ser asesinatos en serie. El asesino había tenido cuidado: usó veneno que no tenía sabor ni olor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fotógrafo profesional Charles Rathbun afirma que la modelo Linda Sobek murió durante un encuentro sexual consensuado que salió mal, pero el cadáver de Sobek y las imágenes digitales cuentan una historia más siniestra.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two years after the disappearance of his wife, Josh Powell kills his two sons and himself; Josh's last in-depth TV interview; a 911 dispatcher discusses the emergency call placed by a social worker.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two Tulsa brothers fight for more than 20 years to prove their innocence after they were wrongfully convicted for separate murders.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a woman whose remains were found in her Frisco, Texas, garage leads detectives to a series of suspects with connections to the victim's complicated and secretive life.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Slaps, Smacks, Screams and Spit You Never Saw
programme.desc: A lot of crazy stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Viva La Flav
programme.desc: The final two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Puerto Vallarta for an exotic three day Mexican getaway.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Finale)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the original Flavorettes are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Sumthin's Stinkin' in the House of Flav
programme.desc: Flavor Flav welcomes 20 new women to his mansion with the hope of finding someone “real” this time around.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav is Blind
programme.desc: Flavor Flav challenges his remaining fourteen Flavorettes to a blind speed dating competition (to get to know them without the influence of “physicality-ness”).

programme.title: Flavor of Love: She Works Hard for Her Honey
programme.desc: Twelve girls are left and jealousy is running rampant. Flav divides the girls into groups of six and presents them with two challenges.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Jelly on the Telly
programme.desc: Flavor Flav wants a girl who knows how to move.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Famous Friends and Strangeness
programme.desc: Flavor Flav knows everyone who's anyone in the hip hop industry and today he wants to have them all over to his house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Who Loves New York? (Photo Shoot To The Death)
programme.desc: Just like last season, Flav has invited a special guest from his past to help give him input on his selection of ladies.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Boxin' Each Other Out
programme.desc: The five girls left want the inside scoop, so he puts all five of the girls in the parlor with a ballot box and pictures of themselves.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Steppin' Out Flav Style
programme.desc: Four girls are left and it's time to go on a little trip. Flav takes two girls down to the shore for a day of sailing with his ladies as crew. Then to the luxurious Queen Mary for an overnight.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Oh No She Didn't! (Clip Show)
programme.desc: A lot of incredible stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls' arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav Belize In Love (Finale)
programme.desc: Two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Placencia Belize for an exotic three day getaway during their stay.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Reunion)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the Flavorettes from season 2 are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Against all odds, Holly J has fallen for Declan. Suddenly she gets what everyone’s been so excited about for so long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s living the high school dream. The basketball team made it to the provincial finals, the Sports Awards Gala is coming up, and he finally has a mentor who gets him – Coach Carson.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s life is on the fast track. With the final basketball game approaching, the pressure is at an all-time high and Coach Carson has really taken KC under his wing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma and Kelly make a pit stop at Degrassi while on their Cross Country Bike Adventure raising awareness for their Re-Cycle project. Combining the great outdoors with her sexy boyfriend, Emma’s convinced she’s destined for the best summer ever.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s been a tough year for Peter. Mia’s departure, a brief meth problem, and the serious downgrade from lead singer to roadie.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya have been planning for their Spring Formal for as long as they can remember. It’s going to be magical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Anya is more determined than ever to convince Sav they should be together – even if he is bringing family-friend and arranged-marriage-bride Farrah to the Spring Formal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Post-KC, Clare’s social life consists of building props for Declan’s musical and reading every book in the “Fortnight” vampire series. But when Clare has a sexy vampire dream about Declan, she’s shocked by her inner fantasy life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s completed anger management and has been named ‘Degrassi’s most eligible bachelor’. He’s been keeping his true feelings about guys under wraps – but he’s not sure he wants to anymore.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Holly J and Declan are closer than ever. They’ve made it through the year, Holly J’s applied for internships all over the city, and with exams almost done, all they need to worry about is Declan’s musical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Later, High School. Hello New York City! In THE REST OF MY LIFE, Degrassi grads and friends dive into the summer that will change their lives forever. And what’s summer without a little romance – or a wedding...

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of `Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the northern hemisphere hit hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts journeys 40,000 years back in time on the trail of the great beasts of the ice age. This was the last time that giants like mammoths, woolly rhinos and sabre-toothed cats ruled our planet.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: While on holiday in Paris, the Doctor and Romana experience a time distortion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scarlioni is planning to steal the Mona Lisa. Yet he has six in his cellar - all genuine.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Count Scarlioni is really Scaroth, last of the Jagaroth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scaroth intends to travel back in time to save his own people from destruction.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Meglos plans to steal the ancient and powerful Dodecahedron from Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Posing as the Doctor, Meglos penetrates the underground city of Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Meglos escapes with the Dodecahedron and the Doctor is mistakenly held responsible.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor must prevent Meglos from using the dodecahedron to destroy Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: With the TARDIS disabled, the Doctor is powerless to act when Romana is kidnapped.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to repair the TARDIS so that he can come to Romana's rescue.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana suspect that the Nimon are a small part of a large invasion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana visit the Leisure Hive, a tourist attraction on the planet Argolis.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana track down the cause of the mysterious deaths at the Leisure Hive.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Tachyon Recreation Generator ages the Doctor into a white haired old man.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The obsessed Pangol is determined to give Argolis a future and strike back at the Foamasi.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Arriving on Earth, the Doctor, Harry and Sarah meet a group of stranded human colonists.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah has been captured by Styre who is conducting experiments on the captured humans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands on the old Dalek homeworld of Skaro.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Davros has awoken from his centuries long slumber and is taken prisoner by the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that the Daleks need Davros to break the stalemate in their war with the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah finds a mysterious fossilized hand, which re-grows and begins to move.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The hand builds power and reacts to nuclear radiation, causing an overload situation.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The fossilized hand has regenerated into a Kastrian called Eldrad who appears to be female.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese hates being on his leash; an American Eskimo barks and circles strangers who enter the house; a Nova Scotia duck tolling retriever with a fear of pools.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actor and comedian Kathy Griffin with her two rescue dogs, Chance and Pom Pom, who are disobedient and territorial.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two troubled dogs, and their families, win sessions with Cesar after auditioning at a pet store in Orange County, Calif.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Dave Glassman adopts pit bulls Blackjack and Memphis together, but one day during a barking fit, the two dogs turn on each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar works to dial down the bad behaviors of four problem dogs who won sessions at the PETCO auditions.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar celebrates the show's 100th episode with a grand reunion of many of the past guests and their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daschund Lotus is very territorial; his aggression sends his owner Chari to the hospital; Cesar makes a house call to see Joey, a German Shepard who is territorial over the second story of his owner's home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog is nervous around other dogs and occasionally nips at people; a Vizsla who resists going outside due to her fear of cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar teams up with horse whisperer Pat Parelli to improve the behavior of the dogs and horses at a riding center; a schnauzer/poodle mix with separation anxiety and dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 years after its premiere, Forensic Files remains the most successful true-crime series of all time. Inspired by the O.J. Simpson murder case, the series went onto over 400 episodes where science catches the bad guys.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
